name: GBT Classifier
description: Gradient-Boosted Trees (GBTs) is an ensemble-based classification algorithm that incrementally builds decision trees to improve prediction accuracy. It supports binary classification using both continuous and categorical features.
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input and performs Gradient-Boosted Tree classification
output: The trained GBT classification model is passed to downstream nodes along with the original input DataFrame

fields.name: featuresCol
fields.title: Features Column
fields.description: Vector column containing all input features used by the model to learn boosted decision rules.

fields.name: labelCol
fields.title: Label Column
fields.description: Target column representing the binary business outcome that the model is trained to predict.

fields.name: predictionCol
fields.title: Prediction Column
fields.description: Name of the column where predicted class labels are written after model scoring.

fields.name: impurity
fields.title: Impurity
fields.description: Metric used to evaluate how well splits separate different classes within individual trees.

fields.name: lossType
fields.title: Loss Function
fields.description: Loss function minimized during training. Logistic loss is used for binary classification.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Defines the proportion of data used for training versus validation to evaluate model generalization.

fields.name: maxBins
fields.title: Max Bins
fields.description: Maximum number of bins used to discretize continuous feature values for split evaluation.

fields.name: maxDepth
fields.title: Max Depth
fields.description: Maximum depth of each decision tree, controlling complexity and reducing overfitting.

fields.name: maxIter
fields.title: Max Iterations
fields.description: Number of boosting iterations, where each iteration adds a new tree to refine predictions.

fields.name: minInfoGain
fields.title: Min Information Gain
fields.description: Minimum improvement required before a split is accepted, preventing weak or noisy splits.

fields.name: minInstancesPerNode
fields.title: Min Instances Per Node
fields.description: Minimum number of records required in each leaf node to ensure statistically reliable decisions.

fields.name: subsamplingRate
fields.title: Subsampling Rate
fields.description: Fraction of the training data sampled for each tree, introducing randomness and improving generalization.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Seed value used to control randomness and ensure reproducible training results.

fields.name: stepSize
fields.title: Step Size
fields.description: Learning rate that controls how strongly each tree contributes to the final model.

fields.name: cacheNodeIds
fields.title: Cache Node Ids
fields.description: Caches intermediate tree nodes to improve training performance for deep boosting models.

fields.name: checkpointInterval
fields.title: Checkpoint Interval
fields.description: Defines how frequently training checkpoints are created to manage memory usage.

fields.name: maxMemoryInMB
fields.title: Max Memory
fields.description: Maximum memory allocated for internal computations such as histogram aggregation.

fields.name: validationIndicatorCol
fields.title: Validation Indicator Column
fields.description: Column indicating whether each row belongs to training or validation data.

fields.name: featureSubsetStrategy
fields.title: Feature Subset Strategy
fields.description: Defines how many features are considered at each split to control randomness and performance.

fields.name: minWeightFractionPerNode
fields.title: Min Weight Fraction per Node
fields.description: Ensures that each split retains a minimum proportion of weighted data.

fields.name: weightCol
fields.title: Weight Column
fields.description: Optional column defining the relative importance of records during training.

fields.name: minInfoGainGrid
fields.title: Min Information Gain Param Grid Search
fields.description: Candidate minimum information gain values evaluated during hyperparameter tuning.

fields.name: maxBinsGrid
fields.title: Max Bins Param Grid Search
fields.description: Range of Max Bins values tested to optimize split precision.

fields.name: maxDepthGrid
fields.title: Max Depth Param Grid Search
fields.description: Different tree depth values evaluated to balance accuracy and interpretability.

fields.name: maxIterGrid
fields.title: Max Iteration Param Grid Search
fields.description: Different boosting iteration counts tested to control learning strength.

fields.name: output_confusion_matrix_chart
fields.title: Output Confusion Matrix Chart
fields.description: Enables visualization of classification results across predicted and actual classes.

fields.name: cm_chart_title
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Title
fields.description: Title displayed on the confusion matrix chart.

fields.name: cm_chart_description
fields.value: Visual Representation of Predicted vs. Actual Classes
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Description
fields.description: Business explanation describing prediction accuracy and error patterns.

fields.name: confusionMatrixTargetLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Target Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing actual class values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixPredictedLabelLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Predicted Label Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing predicted class values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixCountLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Count Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing record counts per outcome.

fields.name: confusionMatrixRowDescription
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Outcome Description
fields.description: Business interpretation of correct predictions and misclassifications.

fields.name: output_roc_curve
fields.title: Output ROC Curve
fields.description: Enables ROC curve visualization to assess classification performance.

fields.name: roc_title
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Title
fields.description: Title displayed on the ROC curve chart.

fields.name: roc_description
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Description
fields.description: Explanation of how well the model distinguishes between positive and negative classes.

fields.name: xlabel
fields.title: X Label
fields.description: X-axis representing the false positive rate.

fields.name: ylabel
fields.title: Y Label
fields.description: Y-axis representing the true positive rate.
